sheet_name: แบบขยายห้องน้ำ WC.1
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า13.png
view_title: รูปตัดห้องน้ำ WC.1 (มุม 1)

elements.description: Interior wall elevation showing full-height ceramic tile from floor to a mirror strip near the top; overall wall height 2.70m, tile/fixture zone height 2.00m (sub-split 0.60 lower + 0.20 + grout coursing + 1.00 upper mirror strip, reading bottom to top, plus a 0.70m band above)
Mirror (M.), left-center of elevation, above LAV.2 wash basin
Wall-hung wash basin below the mirror
Hand-shower/bidet spray (HS.) fitting mounted low, beside WC.1
Hand-held shower head (SW.) with hose, right side of elevation, in the อาบน้ำ (shower) zone
Soap dish (SP.) mounted above the SW. shower area
Floor-level box marker '[3]+0.50[2]' under the ห้องน้ำ1 zone
Floor-level box marker '[3]+0.48[2]' under the shower zone (อาบน้ำ) -- 20mm lower than the WC.1 zone, consistent with the floor slope note on the plan sheet
Bottom horizontal dimension chain: 0.40 + 0.80 + 0.50 + 0.45 + 0.45 = 2.60, sub-grouped as 1.80 (left cluster, incl. shower) + 0.10 + 1.00 (right cluster) — printed total groupings 1.80 and 1.00
Circled callouts '2' (top wall) and '3' (left, mid-height) mark tile-material or section-reference points, matching the numbering seen on the WC.1 plan (หน้า12)

warnings: This sheet (A-11) shows two interior wall elevations/sections of the WC.1 bathroom, cut in different directions (labelled '1' and '2' at the bottom, matching section-cut arrows on the plan sheet หน้า12); this file covers view '1'. View '2' is in _หน้า13_wc1_side_profile2.json.
The overall 2.70m wall height and 0.48/0.50m level markers match exactly what is independently read on the plan sheet (หน้า12_wc1_plan.json) — cross-consistent.

Fine tile-coursing sub-dimensions (0.60/0.20/0.20/1.00/0.70 breakdown of the 2.70m wall) are small print and only medium confidence; flagged for zoom review, same caveat pattern as house 1's equivalent sheet.
